description: Chain split risks refer to vulnerabilities that arise when a blockchain splits into multiple chains, such as during a hard fork. This can lead to: - Confusion or inconsistencies in contract logic. - Loss of funds or data. - Exploitation of vulnerabilities in cross-chain operations.
name: Chain Split Risks
remediation: - **Handle chain splits:** Implement logic to handle potential chain splits. - **Use chain identifiers:** Include chain identifiers in cross-chain communications. - **Test thoroughly:** Conduct extensive testing to ensure contract logic is robust.
